metadata.purpose: Measured classifications for current-vs-origin/main benchmark threshold hits. The comparator remains generic; this sidecar records focused profiling conclusions.

overrides.note: Focused profile: scan cold 3.08 s vs non-scan cold 1.11 s with matching convergence; warm runtime is about 8x faster than origin/main. Keep scan default, defer cache-aware cold short-solve selector.
Peak memory is higher than origin/main, but cold and warm runtime are both lower; accepted scan-runner/XLA memory tradeoff.
Peak memory is higher than origin/main, but cold runtime improves and warm runtime is much faster; accepted scan-runner/XLA memory tradeoff.
Peak memory is higher than origin/main, but cold and warm runtime both improve; accepted scan-runner/XLA memory tradeoff.
Peak memory is higher than origin/main, but cold and warm runtime both improve; accepted scan-runner/XLA memory tradeoff.
